strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production systems
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth in Kotlin/Java for backend services
Cloud platform experience narrow to AWS CDK; no clear GCP, Azure, or Kubernetes production depth beyond self-hosted GISCollective
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, multi-decade full-stack experience squarely aligned with the TypeScript/Node.js/React core of the role, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP framework work matching the agent-development requirement. Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, code katas) and architecture exposure across micro-services, GIS platforms, and pricing systems map well to the responsibilities. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary-stack (Kotlin/Java depth), which are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record.
